Name: Label
Description: A display label for the domain.

Name: Description
Description: A description of the content and purpose of the domain.

Name: OutParameter
Description: Allows for the response to be bound to one of the QuestionItem's OutParameters, so the collected information can be used elsewhere, for example as inputs to subsequent questions in an Instrument or to a GenerationInstruction. If multiple responses are possible, this would represent and ordered array of the responses.

Name: ResponseCardinality
Description: Allows the designation of the minimum and maximum number of responses allowed for this response domain.

Name: ContentDateOffset
Description: Identifies the difference between the date applied to the data as a whole and this specific item such as previous year's income or residence 5 years ago.
